title: Who would Shinji have seen
wikitext:
[]: Who would Shinji have seen?             Quote Post by AVman9 » Tue Dec 22, 2009 1:35 pm A thought came across my mind the other day... If SEELE had opted for a plan to start instrumentality without Shinji being directly involved, who would he have seen as the "AT Field neutralizer?" e.g. Maya sees Ritsuko I honestly was stuck betweem Rei, Asuka and Misato. There are others I considered as well. What does the almighty EGF userbase think?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Dec 22, 2009 1:38 pm I would imagine it would be exactly like in EoE -- that nice boy Kaworu Nagisa reaching out to him.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Dec 22, 2009 2:17 pm Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by zilluss » Tue Dec 22, 2009 2:49 pm Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Tue Dec 22, 2009 2:54 pm Rei and Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Dec 22, 2009 3:19 pm As Mr. Tines briefly touched on; the general theory of Transition Guides is often extended to include Kaworu's appearance before Shinji, DE-01's appearance to Gendou and sometimes even Misato's last words seemingly directed to Kaji.

[]:             Quote Post by AVman9 » Tue Dec 22, 2009 3:29 pm Mr. Tines wrote: I would imagine it would be exactly like in EoE -- that nice boy Kaworu Nagisa reaching out to him.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Dec 22, 2009 3:41 pm AVman9 wrote: Although I don't think that makes my topic completely invalid.....I hope...

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Dec 22, 2009 3:43 pm Asuka would see her mother or Shinji, I would think; the two people whose approval she craved most. Since she just had her maternal bonding moment, my money would be on Shinji. Wouldn't that have been a sight, one of the Ikari siblings turning into the other?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Dec 22, 2009 3:58 pm I think it would be either be Asuka or Kaworu. Considering we see a Giant Naked Kaworu in EoE it would probably be Kaworu. zilluss wrote: Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Dec 22, 2009 4:45 pm Probably because seeking Gendo's love and approval is more or less the crux of his entire being.

[]:             Quote Post by zilluss » Tue Dec 22, 2009 4:49 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Why do you think Gendo?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Dec 22, 2009 5:25 pm himself with boobs

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Dec 22, 2009 5:29 pm Probably still Kaworu, being the only person to really offer love and acceptance to Shinji so completely and unconditionally, combined with the enormous amounts of guilt Shinji felt about having killed him. Considering Shinji's poorly-timed confession to Asuka during preinstrumentality she could also have been a possibility, for sure, but at the same time I don't see why his romantic/sexual feelings for Asuka and his feelings for Kaworu can't coexist. Kaworu's unconditional love and acceptance have almost a parental quality to them, whereas I don't think Shinji was really even aware that Asuka had any interest in him. NemZ wrote: himself with boobs

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Dec 22, 2009 6:56 pm I think he would see Kaworu. Considering how much Shinji wants to be loved but also believes he doesn’t deserver to be loved, its most likely he would see the only person to ever tell him he was loved and who he was then forced to kill proving, to him at lest, he doesn’t deserver love.

[]:             Quote Post by knightrous » Tue Dec 22, 2009 7:02 pm Yui

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Dec 22, 2009 9:53 pm knightrous wrote: Yui

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Dec 22, 2009 10:17 pm Remember, guys, Shinji saw Kaworu during 3I because Kaworu was actually there . His soul was in the Adambryo on Gendo's hand. Rei assimilated Gendo's hand and thus assimilated Kaworu's soul. Then Lilith bellychomped Rei and got Rei's and Kaworu's souls. Lilith first took on Rei's form, then when Kaworu decided to "show himself", his form appeared as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 22, 2009 10:23 pm Well, if the actual film is any indication, Shinji sees this right after Yui asks "What do you wish for"?: "Female chest" according to the script. But the ends of the hair sure look familiar , don't they? EDIT: Who Asuka sees is anybody's guess considering Anno doesn't show us that, but my guess is a toss up between Kyoko, Kaji, or Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Dec 22, 2009 10:29 pm NAveryW wrote: Remember, guys, Shinji saw Kaworu during 3I because Kaworu was actually there .
